title: conyza fruticulosa
intro: Conyza fruticulosa, also known as bushy fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Conyza fruticulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds and utilization in traditional medicine.
